title: Complexity Classes, Reductions, and Feasibility Boundaries · Cost-Model Clinic: P Np
summary: Explain why a requested exact optimizer needs changed scope or a bounded alternative. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 p np increment in a feasibility and reduction decision memo. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Describe polynomial verification and solution concepts without claiming unresolved equalities.
Translate optimization questions to decision form without losing the threshold meaning.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
